name: SurveyMonkey
description: SurveyMonkey is an online survey platform. Use this API to create and manage surveys, collect responses, analyze results, and manage contacts for survey distribution.

capabilities.name: manage_surveys
capabilities.description: Create, list, update, and delete surveys in your account.

capabilities.name: get_survey_responses
capabilities.description: Retrieve individual and bulk responses for a survey.

capabilities.name: manage_collectors
capabilities.description: Create and manage survey collectors (web links, email invitations).

capabilities.name: manage_contacts
capabilities.description: Create and manage contact lists for survey distribution.

capabilities.name: get_survey_details
capabilities.description: Retrieve detailed survey structure including pages, questions, and answer choices.
